Investment | Jesse Morley

Investment

Packages from $2,500.

I've written this pricing guide to cover most scenarios — but if you have something different in mind, just let me know and we can work something out.

Up to 4 hours

Intimate

$2,500
  • Elopements and intimate weddings (max 30 guests)
  • 150–250 high-resolution, print-ready images
  • Password-protected online gallery
  • Video consult and pre-wedding guidance
  • Location scout where possible
Enquire

Up to 8 hours

Flexible

$3,700
  • Start early or finish late — your choice
  • 400–500 professionally edited images
  • Password-protected gallery + social download
  • Initial video consultation or coffee
  • Timeline guidance and location scout
  • Preview album (~50 images) within two weeks
  • Full collection within six weeks
Enquire

Up to 10 hours

Complete

$4,260
  • Everything: prep (both parties), ceremony, formals, reception, first dance
  • 500–700 professionally edited images
  • Password-protected gallery + social download
  • Initial video consultation or coffee
  • Timeline guidance and location scout
  • Preview album (50–100 images) within two weeks
  • Full collection within six weeks
Enquire

Engagement session

Up to 2 hours. A relaxed pre-wedding shoot — great for getting comfortable in front of the camera.

$1,000

or $800 when added to a wedding package

Add-ons

35mm Film Coverage

For those who can't go past the warm, grainy charm of film. Three rolls of Kodak Portra + B&W — analogue coverage woven through your day.

$400

Second Shooter

Capture additional angles of those once-only moments. Especially recommended when prep is happening across two separate locations.

$900

Travel

Travel within two hours of Sydney is included. Additional hours (one way) charged at $100/h. Ask about interstate or international options.

$100/hr

Fine Art Album

Printed by Atkins Lab on Kodak photographic paper with Italian bookbinding. Elegant etched linen cover, archival construction. Size: 8 × 10.6".

From $630

Still not sure? Let's have a chat.

I'd love to arrange a quick video call to make sure I'm the right match for you.
